name: Guilt-Free Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup roughly chopped pitted (make sure all pits are gone!) prunes
1 cup cocoa (much better to use dutch-processed)
3/4 cup sugar, or more healthful substitute like malt sugar
1 cup egg whites, or egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently cook the chopped prunes and liquid in a saucepan for about 5 minutes until softened.
2. Process the prunes in a food processor, adding any remaining liquid from the saucepan as well. Allow to cool.
3. Add egg whites or substitute, vanilla extract, buttermilk to the cooled prunes. Mix in dry ingredients.
4. Spread mixture into a prepared springform pan (use non-stick spray like Pam).
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. If not fully baked, it will be fudgy with no raw spots.
6. Cool completely before removing from pan. Individual pieces can be frozen and reheated in the microwave. Serve with pureed, sweetened raspberries for an extra treat.
